engines.name: Assignment Engine
engines.description: Evaluates candidate employees for open positions using availability, qualifications, leave, and seniority data.

engines.name: Coverage Engine
engines.description: Calculates minimum staffing coverage and highlights gaps by watch, station, and role.

engines.name: Conflict Detection
engines.description: Uses rule engine outcomes to block double-bookings, leave overlaps, and qualification mismatches.

engines.name: Open Shift Recommendations
engines.description: Ranks eligible employees for open shifts and voluntary overtime opportunities.
